betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Wireless Crafting Terminal§f

§aCraft from anywhere within wireless range.§f

The §bWireless Crafting Terminal§f combines wireless access with a §e3×3 crafting grid§f. Craft from anywhere within wireless range.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e0§f (wireless, no cable required)
§b•§f Crafting grid: §e3×3§f
§b•§f Range: depends on §bWireless Boosters§f

§6How It Works§f:
Functions identically to the §bME Crafting Terminal§f but wirelessly. Requires a §bWireless Access Point§f on the network.

§6Range Calculation§f:
§b•§f Base range: §e16 blocks§f
§b•§f Each §bWireless Booster§f adds: §e16 blocks§f
§b•§f 4 boosters = 80 blocks (effectively infinite for most bases)

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b1× Wireless Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× Crafting Table§f
§b•§f §b1× Calculation Processor§f

§6Strategic Role§f:
The §bWireless Crafting Terminal§f lets you §9craft on the go§f — in mines, in the Nether, at your farm, or in your build zone. No cable runs needed.

§eTip§f: Carry a §bWireless Crafting Terminal§f and §bCharged Staff§f for portable crafting + combat in any situation.
